name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Logout Events
notes: Edit this BB to include all events that indicate successful logout attempts from the devices.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Logout Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Admin Logout, Authentication.Auth Server Logout, Authentication.FTP Logout, Authentication.Host Logout, Authentication.Misc Logout, Authentication.Remote Access Logout, Authentication.Samba Logout, Authentication.SSH Logout, Authentication.Telnet Logout, Authentication.VoIP Logout, Authentication.Web Service Logout
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Logout Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Admin Logout, Authentication.Auth Server Logout, Authentication.FTP Logout, Authentication.Host Logout, Authentication.Misc Logout, Authentication.Remote Access Logout, Authentication.Samba Logout, Authentication.SSH Logout, Authentication.Telnet Logout, Authentication.VoIP Logout, Authentication.Web Service Logout
